untranslatable_reason: This is a market-neutral pairs/hedge strategy requiring simultaneous execution of two instruments (IGE long + SPY short with equal dollar amounts). The backtest engine indicator list does not support: (1) multi-instrument rules that enforce dollar-amount parity between different assets, (2) relative value conditions comparing two separate securities, (3) simultaneous position management across different symbols. The strategy also lacks explicit entry conditions—only a vague exit date of November 2007. The source code snippet (daily returns calculation) provides no actionable entry signal. This requires a custom multi-leg order engine, not a single-instrument rule translator.
translation_notes: Signal describes a statistical arbitrage / market-neutral hedge fund strategy. Entry conditions are not quantifiable in single-instrument terms. Exit condition is time-based (November 2007) rather than price/indicator-based. Backtest Sharpe of 0.7893 is provided but insufficient to derive entry rules. Recommend implementing as a custom multi-asset backtest module rather than a standard pattern rule.
